title: File Clerks
description: File correspondence, cards, invoices, receipts, and other records in alphabetical or numerical order or according to the filing system used. Locate and remove material from file when requested.

tasks.text: Perform general office activities, such as typing, answering telephones, operating office machines, processing mail, or securing confidential materials.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Keep records of materials filed or removed, using logbooks or computers and generate computerized reports.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Gather materials to be filed from departments or employees.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Find, retrieve, and make copies of information from files in response to requests and deliver information to authorized users.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Add new material to file records or create new records as necessary.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Sort or classify information according to guidelines, such as content, purpose, user criteria, or chronological, alphabetical, or numerical order.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Scan or read incoming materials to determine how and where they should be classified or filed.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Eliminate outdated or unnecessary materials, destroying them or transferring them to inactive storage, according to file maintenance guidelines or legal requirements.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Answer questions about records or files.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Assign and record or stamp identification numbers or codes to index materials for filing.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Place materials into storage receptacles, such as file cabinets, boxes, bins, or drawers, according to classification and identification information.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Modify or improve filing systems or implement new filing systems.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Input data, such as file numbers, new or updated information, or document information codes into computer systems to support document and information retrieval.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Complete general financial activities, such as processing accounts payable, reviewing invoices, collecting cash payments, or issuing receipts.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Track materials removed from files to ensure that borrowed files are returned.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Perform periodic inspections of materials or files to ensure correct placement, legibility, or proper condition.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Retrieve documents stored in microfilm or microfiche and place them in viewers for reading.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Operate mechanized files that rotate to bring needed records to a particular location.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Design forms related to filing systems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
